use_cases: Comparing multiple data series across categories in dashboards
Displaying time-series analytics with multiple metrics
Visualizing comparative performance across geographic regions
Business intelligence reporting with grouped metrics
Data monitoring interfaces showing multi-dimensional statistics
ai_summary: A grouped vertical bar chart component for visualizing comparative metrics across multiple categories or time periods. Uses the visx library to render multi-series data with color-coded bars for each data dimension. Designed for analytics dashboards, reporting interfaces, and data monitoring tools requiring clear comparative visualization.
